title: MoMo Super App — User Growth Campaign
subtitle: Product & Growth Marketing | 2024

paragraphs: Growth marketing campaign for MoMo's new feature set — gifting, digital card creation, and everyday payment services. Worked on product development collaboration and activation campaigns to drive feature adoption across Vietnam's largest e-wallet user base.
bullets: Developed feature launch strategy and rollout plan for gifting, digital card, and payment features
Designed gamified onboarding journeys to reduce friction and increase feature discovery
Created referral and loyalty program to incentivize existing user activation
Built in-app notification strategy for feature discovery moments
Established campaign analytics framework to track adoption and retention metrics
Optimized onboarding flow to maximize new feature trial rates

campaign.name: MoMo Super App User Growth
campaign.objective: Drive adoption of MoMo's new product features (gifting, digital cards, payment) among Vietnam's largest e-wallet user base
campaign.target_audience: Existing MoMo users in Vietnam; new-to-feature and lapsed users
campaign.insight: Users have entrenched habits around payment apps — feature adoption requires making discovery feel rewarding and social rather than transactional
strategy: Gamified onboarding journeys to make feature discovery feel rewarding
Referral and loyalty programs leveraging MoMo's social graph
In-app notification strategy targeting high-engagement moments
Campaign analytics framework for adoption and retention tracking
results: Feature launch strategy and rollout plan

summary: MoMo super app growth campaign driving adoption of new features (gifting, digital cards, payments) through gamified onboarding, referral programs, and in-app notifications for Vietnam's largest e-wallet platform.
